response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, architecture, and team leadership across diverse industries, including IT consulting, open-source projects, and digital infrastructure. His background aligns closely with the role's requirements, particularly in open-source technologies, Linux/Unix environments, and leadership in interdisciplinary teams. While his German proficiency is listed as 'Basic' (below the C1 requirement), his fluent English and deep technical expertise mitigate this concern. His entrepreneurial experience and technical depth in architecture and development further strengthen his candidacy.
strengths: Extensive senior-level experience in software development, architecture, and team leadership across multiple industries
Strong background in open-source technologies, Linux/Unix environments, and modern software systems
Proven track record in mentoring teams, contributing to architectural design, and managing complex IT projects
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic' (below the C1 requirement)
Limited explicit mention of UML expertise or formal architecture modeling experience
No direct experience in IT security, risk management, or compliance as a primary focus

key_factors.factor: Senior leadership and team management experience
Technical expertise in open-source technologies and Linux/Unix
